name: Beta Bionics Inc. Common Stock
summary: Beta Bionics, Inc. is a medical technology company focused on developing and commercializing innovative products for diabetes management. The company is developing the iLet Bionic Pancreas System, an autonomous insulin delivery system designed to mimic a biological pancreas, and is headquartered in Concord, Massachusetts. Beta Bionics aims to improve the lives of people with diabetes through its automated insulin delivery technology.
